title: A round white and yellow UFO was observed in Curitiba-PR [1993]

text_preview:
FEB 19th, 1993. Time: 20:00. Duration: 30 minutes. In Pinheirinho, Curitiba, State of Paraná, five people observed a small, round, white and yellow UFO between the South and the East regions of the city. According to the witnesses, the unidentified flying object moved at a slow speed in a straight path. The sighting occurred in a cloudy weather and with the naked eye.

Cf. ARQUIVO NACIONAL (Brasil). Sistema de Informações do Arquivo Nacional (SIAN). Fundo ‘Objeto Voador Não Identificado (OVNI)’. Código de Referência BR DFANBSB ARX.0.0.339. “Questionário sobre ocorrência de objeto voador não id
summary: Five people in Pinheirinho, Curitiba observed a small round white-and-yellow UFO moving slowly in a straight path for 30 minutes on Feb 19, 1993.
